title.en: Unless it's really unlucky, it won't even enter...

content.en:
The strength of those six Heavenly Ancestors was very strong, even if their strength was suppressed at the fifth stage of the invincible level, they were still extremely close to the fifth stage of the Boundary Breaking level.

Therefore, before entering the core area of the Eternal True Ruins, it is unlikely to fall.

Even if they are besieged by the many creatures inside the Eternal Ruins, they have a way to escape.

Unless it's really unlucky, it won't even enter the core area and fall.

......

The core area of the Eternal Ruins.

After a great fight, a great ancestor finally came here, but he was also injured a lot, and many treasures were used, and even two life-saving treasures were used.

He is Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor.

"Finally here!"

Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor also had some heart palpitations at this moment, the Eternal True Ruins were really as dangerous as in the legend, and he almost confessed several times.

Fortunately, he was able to save his life and escaped from the encirclement several times.

Otherwise, he wouldn't have come here at all.

It didn't take long for him to find the area where Xuantian Platinum was.

"So many Xuantian platinum !!"

Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor was extremely excited.

It would be nice if he got so much Xuantian Platinum!

However, he also noticed these golden trees.

"The Golden Thorn Tree, and it's a Golden Thorn Tree that is comparable to the fifth stage of the invincible level. Under normal circumstances, this kind of tree would only have the strength of ordinary high-level immeasurable lifeforms at most, but it had grown to this extent here, and it should be the energy of Xuantian Platinum that promoted their continuous growth. Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor said.

He didn't immediately snatch the Xuantian Platinum, after all, his own strength was only comparable to a Golden Thorn Tree, and at this moment, these Golden Thorn Trees seemed to have awakened from their slumber.

If he went to snatch the Xuantian Platinum, he would most likely be besieged by all the Golden Thorn Trees.

When the time comes, if you are as strong as him, you will fall.

Of course.

He could also pay a certain price to temporarily burst out with a combat power comparable to the fifth stage of the Boundary Breaking Level, but it was estimated that he would not be able to kill so many Golden Thorn Trees.

"We can only wait for other Heavenly Ancestors to come, and then work together!"

Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor decided.

Time passed slowly, and the other Heavenly Ancestors arrived one by one.

this day.

The six Heavenly Ancestors gathered here, each with some injuries, but the impact was not too great.

At this time, Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor proposed: "Everyone, the strength of the Golden Thorn Tree here is very strong, and there are quite a few of them, we must join forces to have any hope of snatching more Xuantian Platinum!"

"Good!"

The other Heavenly Ancestors all agreed.

"Kill!"

The six Heavenly Ancestors all shot in unison, and each of them showed almost infinitely close to the fifth stage of the Boundary Breaking Level.

Of course, if they were in a desperate situation, they would definitely forcibly burst out with a combat power comparable to the fifth stage of the Boundary Breaking Level.

Thundered!!!!

An extremely tragic battle broke out in this area, and the six Heavenly Ancestors fought while snatching the Xuantian Platinum.

For them, snatching one more Xuantian Platinum is a huge gain.

......

"Fighting broke out in that area!!"

Ye Tian sensed the fluctuations transmitted from that area, it must have been an invincible-level fifth-stage Great Ancestor fighting with those golden trees, and it might even be a Boundary-Breaking Level Fifth Stage Great Ancestor.

At this level of battle, he couldn't participate in it.

He just wanted to quickly replicate the Infinite Realm Armor and then protect himself from here.

Time passed slowly, and the six Heavenly Ancestors were not lightly injured, and many hole cards were used one by one.

However, they also got several Xuantian Platinums.

"Burst out of boundary-breaking strength, after killing them, we can slowly heal and recover!"

Yin Heng Heavenly Ancestor said.

"Good!"

The other five Heavenly Ancestors agreed.

Immediately, they broke out one after another.

Suddenly, the rules of the Eternal Ruins cut through their flesh and blood like knives, causing their bodies to crack continuously.

But they couldn't care about such an injury, and instead shot with all their strength to kill the golden thorn tree.

Rumble!!!

The indestructible Golden Thorn Tree could no longer withstand the attack of the Silver Heng Heavenly Ancestor and shattered one after another.

"Kill!"

Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor held a spear and smashed a golden thorn tree with a single blow.

The strength of the Boundary-Breaking Class is so powerful, completely crushing the fifth-stage combat power of the Invincible Level.

After these six Heavenly Ancestors burst out with all their boundary-breaking strength, these Golden Thorn Trees were killed one by one, and the injuries of the Heavenly Ancestors became more and more serious.

After some time, all of the trees were killed.

"Hahaha, these Xuantian platinums are all ours, everyone will distribute them fairly, how about it?" Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor said.

"Good!"

The other five Heavenly Ancestors agreed.

Just as they were about to collect the Xuantian platinum, a figure appeared.

"Hahaha, thank you to a few Heavenly Ancestors, these Xuantian Platinums will be mine!"

The one who arrived was not a Heavenly Ancestor, but a Fifth Stage Great Ancestor.

"True Night Ancestor !!!"

The six Heavenly Ancestors said angrily.

The True Night Great Ancestor is not an ordinary Great Ancestor, but a very rare Boundary-Breaking Level Fifth Stage Great Ancestor, and his strength is no less than that of the Heavenly Ancestor.

The key is that the True Night Ancestor is not suppressed by the Eternal True Ruins, and can completely burst out with the strength of the true boundary breaking level.

They had just been fighting hard, so they didn't notice that the True Night Ancestor was hiding in the shadows.

Now, they have killed the Golden Thorn Tree at a huge price, and the True Night Ancestor has run out to snatch the Xuantian Platinum, how can they not be angry?

"Kill!"

The six Heavenly Ancestors all attacked the True Night Ancestor.

However, the injured ones are the opponents of the True Night Ancestor.

"Get out!"

The True Night Ancestor immediately cast an immeasurable magic technique that was on the list of immeasurable supernatural powers—the True Extreme Light!

Rumble!!!

The True Extreme Light enveloped these six Heavenly Ancestors all over the world, directly shaking them away.

The six Heavenly Ancestors retreated one after another, the immeasurable blood on their bodies spilled into the void, the immeasurable bones shattered, and the flesh and blood were blurred, which could be described as very miserable.

Seeing that after forcing back the six Heavenly Ancestors, the True Night Great Ancestor did not continue to attack, he knew that it was a little difficult for him to kill the six Heavenly Ancestors, no matter how seriously the Heavenly Ancestors were injured and how weak their strength was, they all had the means to save their lives and die together.

Therefore, he only needed to snatch the remaining Xuantian platinum.

Just when the True Night Ancestor was about to snatch all the Xuantian Platinum, the mutation came again.

"Not good!"

The True Night Ancestor quickly escaped, but it was still a step too late.

A golden palm instantly pierced his defenses, piercing his body.

However, the True Night Ancestor has also practiced another immeasurable magic technique that can be called invincible - the Shadow Mist True Body!

The Shadow Mist True Body is also an immeasurable supernatural technique located on the Infinite Divine Power List, but it is only at the end.

Relying on this immeasurable magic technique, the True Night Ancestor was only slightly injured, and there was no major problem.

And at this time, he finally discovered the existence hidden in the shadows.

"Golden Thorn Treeman!"

True Night Ancestor frowned.

What appeared in front of him was a golden thorn tree man, covered with golden thorn tree scales, with barbs on its back, and its aura was exactly the same as that of the golden thorn tree.

It's just that this Golden Thorn Tree is not invincible, but boundary-breaking.

"The Golden Thorn Tree can also become a Boundary Breaker?"

The True Night Ancestor didn't understand, and the six Heavenly Ancestors were also extremely confused.
